---
title: "LRPLF07: Factors associated with the level of CELF basic concepts (F)"

date: last-modified
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss Z"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

{{< include _partials/_header.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_setup.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_convergence.qmd >}}

## Overview

LRPLF07 is a **level-factors** model for CELF basic concepts (`celf`): what is associated with the score *level* at each of the four timepoints (Beta-Binomial logit, child random intercept; no own baseline).

::: {.callout-important title="Causal labelling + level-model crossover caveat"}

Every non-randomised coefficient is an **adjusted association** under the DAG. The group effect is `group x time` (a per-timepoint coefficient `b_grp_time[t]`, trajectory divergence): after t2 the waitlist crosses over, so the **clean randomised contrast lives only at t2** (`b_grp_time[1]`, labelled *causal*); t3/t4 are post-crossover cohort/timing terms. SES excluded (non-DAG / redundant).

:::

## Model

Beta-Binomial$(N, \mu\kappa, (1-\mu)\kappa)$ on the level count, $N = 18$, with
$\operatorname{logit}\mu_{t} = \alpha + \alpha_{\text{time}[t]} + b_{\text{grp}[t]}\text{group} + \gamma_A A_{\text{std},t} + g_{\text{ability}[t]}z(\text{blocks}) + \gamma_{\text{grp\_ability}}\,\text{group}\,z(\text{blocks}) + u_{\text{child}}$.

![Model diagram](model_graph.png){#fig-model .lightbox fig-align="left"}

{{< include _partials/_priors.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_prior_predictive.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_diagnostics.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_results_factors.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_footer.qmd >}}
